lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Salok:
Gauree, Baavan Akhree ~ The 52 Letters, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਮਾਤਾ ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਪਿਤਾ ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: guradev maataa guradev pitaa guradev suaamee paramesuraa |
lines.english: The Divine Guru is my mother, the Divine Guru is my father; the Divine Guru is my Transcendent Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਦਾਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਉਪਦੇਸੈ ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਮੰਤੁ ਨਿਰੋਧਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: guradev daataa har naam upadesai guradev mant nirodharaa |
lines.english: The Divine Guru is the Giver, the Teacher of the Lord's Name. The Divine Guru is the Mantra which never fails.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਸਖਾ ਅਗਿਆਨ ਭੰਜਨੁ ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਬੰਧਿਪ ਸਹੋਦਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: guradev sakhaa agiaan bhanjan guradev bandhip sahodaraa |
lines.english: The Divine Guru is my companion, the Destroyer of ignorance; the Divine Guru is my relative and brother.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਤੀਰਥੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਸਰੋਵਰੁ ਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨ ਮਜਨੁ ਅਪਰੰਪਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: guradev teerath amrit sarovar gur giaan majan aparanparaa |
lines.english: The Divine Guru is the sacred shrine of pilgrimage, and the pool of divine ambrosia; bathing in the Guru's wisdom, one experiences the Infinite.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਸਤਿ ਬੁਧਿ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਪਾਰਸ ਪਰਸ ਪਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: guradev saant sat budh moorat guradev paaras paras paraa |
lines.english: The Divine Guru is the Image of peace, truth and wisdom. The Divine Guru is the Philosopher's Stone - touching it, one is transformed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਕਰਤਾ ਸਭਿ ਪਾਪ ਹਰਤਾ ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਪਤਿਤ ਪਵਿਤ ਕਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: guradev karataa sabh paap harataa guradev patit pavit karaa |
lines.english: The Divine Guru is the Creator, and the Destroyer of all sins; the Divine Guru is the Purifier of sinners.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਆਦਿ ਜੁਗਾਦਿ ਜੁਗੁ ਜੁਗੁ ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਮੰਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਉਧਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: guradev aad jugaad jug jug guradev mant har jap udharaa |
lines.english: The Divine Guru existed at the primal beginning, throughout the ages, in each and every age. The Divine Guru is the Mantra of the Lord's Name; chanting it, one is saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮੇਲਿ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਹਮ ਮੂੜ ਪਾਪੀ ਜਿਤੁ ਲਗਿ ਤਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: guradev sangat prabh mel kar kirapaa ham moorr paapee jit lag taraa |
lines.english: O God, please be merciful to me, that I may be with the Divine Guru; I am a foolish sinner, but holding onto Him, I am carried across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੁ ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਨਮਸਕਰਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: guradev satigur paarabraham paramesar guradev naanak har namasakaraa |1|
lines.english: The Divine Guru is the True Guru, the Supreme Lord God, the Transcendent Lord; Nanak bows in humble reverence to the Lord, the Divine Guru. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਏਕੋ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਦੂਸਰ ਹੋਆ ਨ ਹੋਗੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak eko rav rahiaa doosar hoaa na hog |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the One Lord is pervading everywhere; there has never been any other, and there never shall be. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਹਿ ਕੀਆ ਕਰਾਇਆ ਆਪਹਿ ਕਰਨੈ ਜੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: aapeh keea karaaeaa aapeh karanai jog |
lines.english: He Himself acts, and causes others to act; He Himself can do everything.
Salok:
In the beginning, in the middle, and in the end, He is the Formless Lord.
ONG: I humbly bow in reverence to the One Universal Creator, to the Holy True Guru.
He Himself is in the absolute state of primal meditation; He Himself is in the seat of peace.
Pauree:
He Himself listens to His Own Praises.
He Himself created Himself.
He is His Own Father, He is His Own Mother.
O God, Merciful to the meek, please be kind to me,
O Nanak, His wondrous play cannot be understood. ||1||
He Himself is subtle and etheric; He Himself is manifest and obvious.
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰ ਆਕਾਰ ਆਪਿ ਨਿਰਗੁਨ ਸਰਗੁਨ ਏਕ ॥
lines.translit: nirankaar aakaar aap niragun saragun ek |
lines.english: He Himself is formless, and also formed; the One Lord is without attributes, and also with attributes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੇ ਸੰਤਨ ਕੀ ਮਨੁ ਹੋਇ ਰਵਾਲਾ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tere santan kee man hoe ravaalaa | rahaau |
lines.english: that my mind might become the dust of the feet of Your Saints. ||Pause||
Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕਹਿ ਏਕ ਬਖਾਨਨੋ ਨਾਨਕ ਏਕ ਅਨੇਕ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ekeh ek bakhaanano naanak ek anek |1|
lines.english: Describe the One Lord as One, and Only One; O Nanak, He is the One, and the many. ||1||
He strung it upon His one thread.
ONG: The One Universal Creator created the Creation through the Word of the Primal Guru.
The Creator has created the creation of all sorts.
From formless, He appeared as form.
He created the diverse expanse of the three qualities.
O Nanak, He has no end or limitation. ||2||
The attachment of the mind has led to birth and death.
He Himself is above both, untouched and unaffected.
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਈ ਸਾਹ ਭਗਵੰਤ ਸੇ ਸਚੁ ਸੰਪੈ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: seee saah bhagavant se sach sanpai har raas |
lines.english: Those who gather Truth, and the riches of the Lord's Name, are rich and very fortunate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੁ ਸੁਚਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਤਿਹ ਸੰਤਨ ਕੈ ਪਾਸਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak sach such paaeeai tih santan kai paas |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, truthfulness and purity are obtained from Saints such as these. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿ ਪੁਰਖ ਤੇ ਭਿੰਨ ਨ ਕੋਊ ॥
lines.translit: sat purakh te bhin na koaoo |
lines.english: No one is separate from the True Primal Lord.
They alone enter the Lord's Sanctuary, whom the Lord inspires to enter.
SASSA: True, True, True is that Lord.
Pauree:
They behold the manifest glory of the Lord.
They are the Holy Saints - they reach this destination.
Meditating, meditating in remembrance, they sing and preach the Glorious Praises of the Lord.
Doubt and skepticism do not affect them at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਕਹਾ ਪੁਕਾਰਤੇ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹ ਸਭ ਕੂਰ ॥
lines.translit: dhan dhan kahaa pukaarate maaeaa moh sabh koor |
lines.english: Why are you crying out for riches and wealth? All this emotional attachment to Maya is false.
Salok:
Nanak is forever a sacrifice to them. ||3||
